positive: An ultra-minimalist, abstract geometric pattern featuring stylized crescent moons, constellations, and flowing celestial ribbons. The design should be composed of clean, interlocking shapes, rendered in deep indigo blue, ethereal gold leaf accents, and cream off-white. The pattern must maintain excellent readability and high contrast, suitable for repeating apparel print placement. Composition must be central and symmetrical. Style: Art Deco meets celestial diagram. Lighting: Flat, even studio lighting emphasizing texture and lines. Aspect Ratio: Perfect square.
